[亚平宁半岛百度百科

又称意大利半岛](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=1&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=0&tj=sg_kg_entity_1_0_10_l7&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=8d9d752d39479b8f&bdenc=1&nsrc=iic9cjI881AfZuKg7mKubm0QI1DQsd/qoD2fse3kxnj+KjHM4/otVxVbCGRMa5Hecb+Hq7lqxP/V8/uAPBlLjgJXC7MGy8Wj0DLDG2kCokCnLECLMZyJqJAY0s4VmPb0AEI2UQnnqAB2zCI9Ov9Aco60DwMvTRt5FCg4WiEpj34=)

**

![](https://ss0.bdstatic.com/9bA1vGfa2gU2pMbfm9GUKT-w/timg?wisealaddin&size=f200_200&quality=60&sec=1563018580&di=b2d1c1c206bd46376310e3c4c0dc3469&src=http://f.hiphotos.baidu.com/baike/crop%253D0%252C16%252C580%252C383/sign=3e80cf75a364034f1b82984692f35500/b03533fa828ba61edda8c9874934970a314e59d7.jpg)

亚平宁半岛(意：penisolaappenninica，英：ApenninePeninsula)，也称意大利半岛(意：Penisolaitaliana，英：ItalianPeninsula)，自北部波河平原向南到地中海中部，因贯穿该半岛的亚平宁山脉而得名。

所属地区:

[南欧](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=1&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=1&tj=sg_kg_entity_1_0_10_l8&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=e0c3dcaf886a8ac0&bdenc=1&nsrc=o34BjaVBU0LDE8gL0XDj3/yX/v20ptMs/Hu0q1Ne0TiUAw5kDVvWWP61LcFiZ37JHJTgC/P6GvX0IHn0QBSZ2Gkb4cJGoZMvdTezB5EjaaUYjpTYFmakylJk3xIZZCm8KWKSQanDJuYzcCpM7L0nMotGamaUt2cdVAqqWVOchh1YUVLkAGWCqBov/mgGnYRrQunJtjI3bqoEkMNSYlTFcU1TJL422NAOaJs0cPcfqZsxNSAwtTH6wH/LP3AJ4zYKhhHxgtt9VLbL2JPDCf43XQ==)

面积:

25.1万平方千米

方言:

[意大利语](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=1&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=1&tj=sg_kg_entity_1_0_10_l9&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=681d7967809a44b1&bdenc=1&)

著名景点:

比萨斜塔、梵蒂冈宫、圣彼得大教堂

政府驻地:

[罗马](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=1&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=1&tj=sg_kg_entity_1_0_10_l10&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=85255bec303bb53a&bdenc=1&)[梵蒂冈](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=1&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=1&tj=sg_kg_entity_1_0_10_l11&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=4766a7fe2cd3f8db&bdenc=1&)[圣马力诺](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=1&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=1&tj=sg_kg_entity_1_0_10_l12&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=7b6629747f49c663&bdenc=1&)

[### 欧洲“四大*半岛*”前三个很发达,唯独它又穷又乱](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=2&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=0&h5ad=0&tj=www_normal_2_0_10_title&url_mf_score=5&vit=osres&m=8&cltj=cloud_title&asres=1&nt=wnor&title=%E6%AC%A7%E6%B4%B2%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A7%E5%8D%8A%E5%B2%9B%E5%89%8D%E4%B8%89%E4%B8%AA%E5%BE%88%E5%8F%91%E8%BE%BE,%E5%94%AF%E7%8B%AC%E5%AE%83%E5%8F%88%E7%A9%B7%E5%8F%88%E4%B9%B1&hwj=1581558224541736&dict=32&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=4fb8eff3059be7d5&bdenc=1&nsrc=iic9cjI881AfZuKg7mKubhYaXq1gfUawE8krsxEXAdLy2jJlp5xt7vA+ze4oe0EPU+svYdIdjrpJbZbTVjIEje7nQf7p3gOtbYR9EtGXu4nPbGeZexpBMsAxcpB8E+mDUkNTBpzuuZ+mRQ7Aa4Eqeg==)

[1.一、斯堪的纳维亚*半岛* 斯堪的纳维亚*半岛*是欧洲最大的*半岛*，面积约为75万平方千米。“斯堪的纳维亚”

2.二、伊比利亚*半岛* 伊比利亚人的热情与散漫并重，得益于伊比利亚*半岛*的地理位置。伊比利亚*半岛*是欧洲第](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=2&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=0&h5ad=0&tj=www_normal_2_0_10_title&url_mf_score=5&vit=osres&m=8&cltj=cloud_title&asres=1&nt=wnor&title=%E6%AC%A7%E6%B4%B2%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A7%E5%8D%8A%E5%B2%9B%E5%89%8D%E4%B8%89%E4%B8%AA%E5%BE%88%E5%8F%91%E8%BE%BE,%E5%94%AF%E7%8B%AC%E5%AE%83%E5%8F%88%E7%A9%B7%E5%8F%88%E4%B9%B1&hwj=1581558224541736&dict=32&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=4fb8eff3059be7d5&bdenc=1&nsrc=iic9cjI881AfZuKg7mKubhYaXq1gfUawE8krsxEXAdLy2jJlp5xt7vA+ze4oe0EPU+svYdIdjrpJbZbTVjIEje7nQf7p3gOtbYR9EtGXu4nPbGeZexpBMsAxcpB8E+mDUkNTBpzuuZ+mRQ7Aa4Eqeg==)

[简介：南欧三大半岛是指南欧地区的三大半岛，南欧三大半岛主要包括以下三大半岛：亚平宁半岛（Italian Peninsula），伊比利亚半岛（Iberian Peninsula），巴尔干半岛（Balkan Peninsula）。](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=4&waplogo=1&fm=alop&isAtom=1&is_baidu=0&dict=-1&tj=bk_polysemy_4_0_10_l1&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=310844be26c7ff00&bdenc=1&nsrc=FydYV5L2/eGw6EM0C+bozP+EFpMajWLBTNRq2ogTUyQ5O7uDXQArsl4h7bHqrVKUyFVn5c8XzcPqT2MmTCJ9pPNZNOHH9lyTFdDnv6CWVZYHtc1d9EF6nSt8M4Stju7aQ5nDOAqVu6EwQ/mtOMZNLTzPMROsA0hci8mpYZLijOit4HzZSCmBKKbHVkasd4/a1Xzf6VkJnm88wD4BzfyRMw==)

[读音][yà píng níng bàn dǎo]

[[解释]也叫意大利半岛。在欧洲南部，地中海中部。包括意大利大部分领土和梵蒂冈、圣马力诺。面积14.9万平方千米。冬季温和多雨，夏季干热，属典型的地中海气候。](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=5&fm=alop&is_baidu=0&tj=kg_dict_wise_5_0_10_l1&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=d4c05aa64c1d9f3c&bdenc=1&)

[[最佳答案]亚平宁指的是*亚平宁半岛*,就是意大利在的那个半岛。足球中借指意大利以及意大利联赛。 *亚平宁半岛*是...](https://m.baidu.com/from=1000539d/bd_page_type=1/ssid=0/uid=0/pu=usm@5,sz@1320_2001,ta@iphone_1_12.3_25_12.1/baiduid=B00D32FABBE288441DE11603E1B0F250/w=0_10_/t=iphone/l=1/tc?ref=www_iphone&lid=7613825840344883248&order=7&fm=wnor&isAtom=1&is_baidu=0&dict=-1&tj=www_zhidao_normal_7_0_10_l2&wd=&eqid=69a9be4313726000100000035d29c553&w_qd=IlPT2AEptyoA_yk66foc5f3xASRSj9gn6C7&bdver=2&tcplug=1&sec=39971&di=237172b90a20ce1d&bdenc=1&nsrc=Dkh1pm7MC7r3Qg9WCNedKyXy57NdrzUZygQvEjOjQrnClAByYTq8Bz71gxnE7ImruTazle4crxUVxNveSwl9DProN61jdtHPX03dPlS/Myr9TaVVxr9lYnP/4EF+89Mk)
